label: Flow A — Ingest & Store
info: Subscribes to bike/+/telemetry, stores each message as a 'bike' point in InfluxDB, and updates the last-seen timestamp used by the connectivity check.

label: Flow B — Fall Detection
info: Checks if a rented bike has tipped over (z-axis far from 9.8) or hit something hard. Only fires once per bike until the readings go back to normal.

label: Flow C — Parking Violation
info: Flags bikes that stop outside the allowed parking zones (loaded from /shared/parking-zones.json). One alert per bike while it stays parked illegally.

label: Flow D — Battery Alerts
info: Raises a low-battery alert when charge drops to 15%, 5%, or 0%. A new alert is only created when the severity level actually changes.

label: Flow E — Connectivity Monitoring
info: Keeps track of when each bike last sent data. If nothing arrives for 1 minute, an alert is raised. Clears automatically once the bike comes back online.

name: Telemetry → bike measurement
Detect Fall (tilt or impact)
Detect Unauthorized Parking
Load parking-zones.json
Check Low Battery (severity tiers)
Check Bike Connectivity
